title: Nested Conditional Logic Puzzler
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a nested conditional logic puzzle with multiple conditions and outcomes. The prompt should take no input and output a high-quality, human-readable puzzle in a Markdown format.
constraints: Must include at least three nested conditional statements

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes at least three nested conditional statements.
Check if the generated logic puzzle is logically correct and has a unique solution.
Check if the generated puzzle is well-formatted and easy to read.
